zh.Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton於1463年出生在英國維爾爾斯圖頓時，他的父親William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton32歲，母親Margaret Chidiocke29歲。他於大約1480年與Agnes Fauntleroy在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1535年12月13日在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton于1463年出生在英国維爾爾斯圖頓时，他的父亲William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton32岁，母亲Margaret Chidiocke29岁。他于大约1480年与Agnes Fauntleroy在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1535年12月13日在他的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton was born in 1463, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, his father, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Chidiocke, was 29. He married Agnes Fauntleroy about 1480, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 December 1535, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton est né en 1463, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Chidiocke, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Fauntleroy environ 1480, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1535, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton 1463 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Chidiocke 29. Er hat um 1480 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Fauntleroy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1535 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton è nato il nel 1463 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Chidiocke, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Fauntleroy circa 1480, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 dicembre 1535, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourtonが1463年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourtonは32歳，母Margaret Chidiockeは29歳であった。約1480年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンでAgnes Fauntleroyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1535年12月13日に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton(이)가 1463년 영국 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Chidiocke(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 Agnes Fauntleroy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1535년 12월 13일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton nasceu em 1463, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Chidiocke, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Fauntleroy aproximadamente 1480, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1535, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton родился в 1463 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Chidiocke, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Fauntleroy около 1480 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 декабря 1535 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton nació en 1463, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Stourton 2nd Baron Stourton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Chidiocke, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Agnes Fauntleroy aproximadamente 1480, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1535, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
